entries.completion_basis: Prime Reborn cutover source merged after final whole-program Strikeforce GREEN

RP-C01-RP-C08 are complete; AJ-01-AJ-12 are PROVEN; CAP-027 is RESTORED/ACTIVE; all 28 capability dispositions are reconciled with 0 BLOCKED and 0 STILL_MISSING. Phoenix recovery is accepted. Sunset PR #224 merged at 40e58dcf33bae68f8c819c2f65c6474f52381718. The generated publisher run 29536662886 proved Ubuntu/Windows parity and a truthful zero-delta NOOP. Living Emberline is COMPLETE/CLOSED; Repairing Prime is removed from active continuity; independent Quest states are unchanged.

entries.readiness_basis: FS-C01-M02 and FS-C01-M03 construction are accepted from exact authored lineage, Ubuntu and Windows validation, detached review, canonical synthetic exercise, immutable recovery, and read-only rollback evidence. FS-C01-M04 still requires a Jayson-selected protected external store and bounded trusted provider/runtime usage evidence.

entries.next_gate: PF-C01-M02 Preview — Preserve the Old Flame
entries.readiness_basis: PF-C01-M01 Mission Seal is accepted with carry-forwards. Apollo commissioning, Windows-specific Codex evacuation, Hermes independent portable access, Windows recovery preservation, extended memory testing, and bounded stability follow-up remain incomplete. Iris and Zeus are source-accepted nonblocking companion endpoints.

entries.readiness_basis: Official architecture-refinement Quest admitted with PA-C01 current and PA-C02 through PA-C10 as the initial roadmap. Runtime, infrastructure deployment, Coppermind, Emberdark, Harmony/Kandra/Cognitive Shadows, Dawnshard, Glass Codex, Phoenix source maintenance, Gitea shadow, canonical cutover, and legacy-route retirement remain unauthorized or unstarted by this Quest.
